summary:
END TIMES AND APOCALYPTIC PREDICTIONS: Brandon shares insights regarding the approaching end times, anticipating serious challenges and significant persecution for the Christian community. He recounts a conversation with Pastor Steve Cioccolanti concerning the apocalyptic horses, suggesting that these horses are already active prior to the tribulation. According to this shared timeline, a three-and-a-half-year period of COVID is being followed by an equal period of war, which will eventually transition into a phase of pestilence. This forecast points to the summer or end of 2026, coinciding with the midterm of President Trump's upcoming presidency, as the onset of a major drought and a deadly plague. Brandon explicitly recalls a vision where he saw President Trump publicly warning American citizens about this severe plague.

GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICTS AND ENVIRONMENTAL ESCALATIONS: Brandon discusses an anticipated acceleration of global conflicts, specifically mentioning the situation with Hamas and a potential major war involving Russia in 2025. Alongside these geopolitical tensions, Brandon expects an increase in severe environmental phenomena. He details future events involving significant signs in the heavens and the earth, encompassing volcanic eruptions, earthquakes, tsunamis, massive hurricanes, and long-track tornadoes, referring to these occurrences as an acceleration of birthing pains.

DIVINE WINDOW OF REVIVAL AND ECONOMIC SHIFTS: Brandon outlines a four-year window of grace and revival that aligns with President Trump's coming term and the current Shemitah cycle, which concludes in 2028. During this period, Brandon anticipates a massive outpouring of the Spirit and a major harvest of souls. He also expects contradictory economic circumstances, predicting both a severe economic crisis during Trump's presidency and a simultaneous supernatural outpouring of finances and wealth-generating ideas for believers.

SUPERNATURAL FAVOR AND SPIRITUAL MANDATES: Brandon shares a divine message he received promising a supernatural abundance of favor and problem-solving wisdom for believers in their daily lives and workplaces. He emphasizes a renewed focus on the Great Commission, urging followers to embrace bold faith by laying hands on the sick, casting out devils, and raising the dead. Furthermore, Brandon recounts a vision where a divine honey glow rested upon believers in makeshift military tents, empowering them to heal others amidst the upcoming crises.

INTERCESSION FOR LEADERSHIP AND GLOBAL PRESERVATION: Brandon highlights the necessity of divine intervention for supernatural leadership in America, specifically naming the directors of the FBI and Homeland Security. He heavily emphasizes supporting RFK Jr. in his efforts to reform the FDA and expose information regarding COVID. Brandon also extends his focus globally, mentioning the prevention of tyrannical lockdowns and the manifestation of divine glory across South Korea, Asia, China, Japan, the Philippines, Africa, and South America.
rawData: [December 05, 2024]-[We went to the park today to pray - a call to prayer - day 47]-[https://youtu.be/GF5JHPdXNqs]-[Good morning, family. Praise the Lord for another day. This is day 47, I believe. Braden and I are out here at the park to do a video because I wanted to show you that this isn't a green screen; these are real live leaves here in the park. It's so beautiful. I just love nature and what the Lord has done in this fall season. I just wanted to say thank you all for all the likes, all the subscribers, and all the support you've shown this channel over the last year. It has been amazing to see what the Lord has done. My son was telling me about all the people and where you all come from—all the different comments saying you've been watching from all over the world. We just want to say thank you for supporting us. I was just thinking about the things the Lord is talking to me about regarding the end times and how close we are to the Lord Jesus coming back. Looking beyond the next four years, it is going to be a very interesting time frame. I try not to be negative, but speaking to my audience right now, I'm telling you there are some trying and very serious days ahead for the body of Christ. There will be great persecution. I talked to Pastor Steve Cioccolanti on the phone today, and we were going over the time frames and what the Lord has shown both of us. We talked about crypto, President Trump, and the things that we see coming. It was a very interesting conversation. His revelation involves the horses of the apocalypse. He believes we went through COVID for three and a half years, and now we have a war cycle for three and a half years. After that, we go through pestilence and plague for another three and a half years. He said on the phone today that the end of 2026, or the summer of 2026, is when he believes we will see a great drought and a great plague. That would be the midterm of President Trump's presidency. I warned you all that I saw President Trump standing on a platform, addressing the American people and warning them of a major, deadly plague. It was a very serious time frame. Steve believes the horses of the apocalypse are riding right now. He believes that the white horse was the corona and the red horse is riding right now with war. He believes a great acceleration of war will be taking place from 2025 through 2026, especially with what we saw with Hamas. I weigh out what he's saying in my spirit. Some people don't believe the horses are riding yet; they believe that happens during the seven years of tribulation. But he believes they ride before the tribulation begins. I like to talk to people and listen to what they feel the Holy Spirit is telling them, instead of always saying, 'This is the way it is.' I gleaned a lot from the conversation today. It stretches me to listen. We are in a serious time frame. I believe the Lord gave us a four-year window for revival—a major outpouring of the Spirit to bring in the harvest. God is giving us an extended amount of grace. When the end of that shmita cycle, the end of the Shemitah cycle, occurs and President Trump's presidency is over in 2028, that would end that cycle of the shmita. I believe the catching away could happen in that time frame. I believe we'll have an outpouring of finances, and we're going to see that in the body of Christ. I've seen a great economic crisis coming during President Trump's presidency, and I believe we're going to see some different things. Things are escalating at a rapid pace. Pastor Steve believes we're going to enter into a major season of war in 2025 with Russia, but we're praying against that. I'm praying for peace, a major harvest of souls, and an extended four-year window for revival and an outpouring of finances. We're going to see an acceleration of the birthing pains that are on us. It's not going to be just economic, political, or about a plague; it's going to be signs in the heavens and the earth, like weather with volcanoes and earthquakes. We're going to see another side of things that has to do with the environment. I saw a great acceleration of environmental events: tsunamis, major hurricanes, and long-track tornadoes. But as a believer, you have authority to pray protection and a hedge around your family. No weapon formed against you will prosper. A thousand shall fall at your side, and ten thousand at your right hand, but it will not come nigh you. That's why I was telling you to pray for RFK Jr.—that God is giving us a window of opportunity for grace and a season of great harvest. Our prayers in October gave us this window. What will we do with this next four years with President Trump coming in and a season of great blessing? Even though I saw an acceleration of war and great darkness, we serve the Lord and have blessing on us. I believe this will be a season of favor like you've never seen before. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm giving favor to My people, a supernatural abundance of favor.' We are ambassadors of the Lord Jesus Christ. Supernatural favor is coming to you and your family. For those who have joined this channel and become part of our family here, I believe that covering and blessing come over you as you help us out. We are a body moving and operating together in the favor of God. Supernatural abundance is coming to your household. The Lord told me last night to start focusing on the dead being raised. This is part of the Great Commission. He told us to raise the dead, cast out devils, and lay hands on the sick. We're going to see more of this in these last days. It's going to take people getting bold in their faith. Let's pray. Father, I thank You for every single person represented here today. I thank You that they are healed and whole by the stripes of Jesus. We pray for RFK Jr. right now, that he will be victorious in every area of his life concerning the health and food administration. We thank You that he will be appointed for such a time as this to turn around the FDA and expose the darkness about COVID. I thank You for the FBI and Homeland Security directors and all the people being put in position. I thank You for supernatural leadership for America. During this four-year window, we will see a major harvest of souls. I thank You, Lord, that You're stirring President Trump right now and bringing supernatural protection over him. I thank You for a supernatural covering over the homes of every person here for finances and creative ideas to get wealth. We believe in the blessings of the Deuteronomy 28 covenant. We will not struggle financially; we have supernatural favor in the name of Jesus. When you go into your workplace, there will be a supernatural wisdom on you. They won't even know what it is, but they'll see something different—a problem-solving anointing. We are the salt, and we are anointed and appointed. Even over South Korea, we pray that we will not see a tyrant government trying to lock everybody down. We pray that those who need to be removed are removed. We see an acceleration of the glory of God even in South Korea, over Asia, China, Japan, the Philippines, Africa, and South America. We pray for restoration in marriages and peace in every home. In the name of Jesus, Amen. Well, everybody, thank you for joining me. You can see the squirrels over there; they're kind of distracting me. There are squirrels everywhere! Look at this one right next to you. They're fat and hungry because they're eating all these acorns. Braden, do you want to say hi? This is Braden. Thank you for subscribers, and I read your comments from all over, like South Korea. It's a really pretty park; I like the leaves. It's going to get cold here in Tulsa soon. I love Tulsa. I was on the phone with Pastor Steve Cioccolanti for a long time today talking about Revelation. He believes we'll go through the war cycle for the next year or so, and then the plague comes. That goes with what I've seen—a massive plague coming during President Trump's term. If that happens and it's part of the green horses, we can't stop that. That means there are a lot of people fixing to perish. That is terrible, but not for you. You're covered in the blood. I saw the 'honey glow' on the body of Christ. I saw people in makeshift military tents with the glory of the Lord resting on them, laying hands on people and seeing them get up because the power of God was resting on them. We have that same authority. If that green horse is riding in 2026, it's interesting because it puts a time frame on my visions. I'm just turning that around in my noggin. Anyway, let's look at these squirrels. They're bold! Look at that big plump one right there. My grandpa would say that's stew. We'd sit out for hours so grandma could fry those up, but they tasted so rough and nasty. I'd ask why we were eating rodents, but that's what we did as kids. It was gross. I'm just thinking about childhood stuff—squirrels and rabbits. Look at those geese. Big old Canadians! Look at that massive oak tree; it must be several hundred years old. I hope you enjoy these prayer videos. I try to do something different so you don't get bored. My job in this end-time ministry is to bring in as many souls as I can and tell you that Jesus is a healer. Nothing else matters other than the Great Commission. If Jesus is giving us a four-year window of reprieve in America, let's do all we can so that not one should perish. Jesus is coming soon. I believe at the end of the next shmita cycle, we'll see... that's just my opinion based on what Billy Brim and Rick Renner and others teach. You pick the Bible scholars you stand by. Thank you for joining me today. Look at those massive dogs! Like, subscribe, and we'll see you tomorrow. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you. God bless you and have a wonderful day. Bye-bye.]
